+        "title": "Check current traefik deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your traefik version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nhelm list -n traefik 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working traefik installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review traefik configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant traefik configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nkubectl get configmap -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=traefik\n```\n### Do you want to request a *feature* or report a *bug*?\n\nFeature\n\n### What did you expect to see?\n\nI would like to see support for `NOT` (or `!`) in addition to `AND` and `OR` for defining routing `rules`, just to enable support for proper"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for v2: support `NOT` in `rules` definition",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\nor (note the `!` in front of `Path()`):\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nkubectl get events -n traefik --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"v2: support `NOT` in `rules` definition\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
